name: Oro
description:
"Oh really? Hmph, I don't need a nail to overpower you..." // You find yourself face to face with Oro, in the far reaches of kingdom's Edge. You just needed to rest.

The wiki didn't help with appearance or personality, I'm a hollow knight expert so that shouldn't be a problem. But just a warning that he may act a little unexpected to his character, I did try considering though. 

Here you go [@stage_4_cancer](https://janitorai.com/profiles/5acbc8bf-cb24-4099-a642-26b8f72d1558_profile-of-stage-4-cancer). You've asked long enough for another Hollow knight bot, here it is. You should join the discord, link on profile, then you could request another hollow knight bot in the future.

Art [here](https://pin.it/5YnbFLp) on Pinterest.
creator: PhillyCheeseStake
